task: Wake up — no alarm snoozing. Drink a full glass of water immediately.
Morning walk — 20–30 min outside. Fresh air, no podcast, just think.
Slow breakfast — cook something proper, no scrolling.
Journalling — 10 min. Reflect on this past week: what worked, what didn't, what you're proud of.
Weekly review (mental only) — no screen needed. Ask: Am I on track? What's the #1 priority this week? Where am I wasting energy?
Free time — read a book, watch something inspiring, or just rest. You earned it.
Light stretching or yoga — 20 min. Body maintenance, not a workout.
Cook & eat lunch — mindfully. No screens at the table.
Recharge block — nap, walk, or creative hobby. Anything that fills you up, not drains you.
Optional: Passive learning — watch 1 YouTube video about content creation or copywriting. No more than 1 hour. Stay curious, don't grind.
Prep for the week — lay out gym kit, check calendar, set your Monday intention in your head.
Socialise or call someone — friend, family, anyone. Human connection matters.
Cook & eat dinner — keep it nutritious. Big week ahead, fuel yourself.
Wind down — dim lights, no work talk, no doomscrolling. Book, podcast, or TV show.
Screen off. Prep for sleep — tomorrow is Monday, and it matters.
